title: MCA Business Plan 2025 to 2026
body: "The business plan sets out:   the services that the agency will deliver and any significant changes it plans to make the resources the agency requires the key performance indicators, by which its performance will be assessed   This plan allows service users and members of the public to assess how the Maritime and Coastguard Agency is performing in operating its key services, managing reforms and the agency’s finances.  Any enquiries regarding this publication should be sent to us at:   Office address and general enquiries   Maritime and Coastguard AgencySpring Place, 105 Commercial RoadSouthamptonSO15 1EG     Email infoline@mcga.gov.uk           Main switchboard 0203 817 2000      "
